scripts.build: uv sync && pnpm install && pnpm -r build
scripts.dev:backend: uv run python -m uvicorn main:app --app-dir backend --reload
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/dist packages/*/dist .venv backend/.venv && find . -type d -name "__pycache__" -exec rm -rf {} + && pnpm store prune
